title: The Royal Encyclopedia
description: A published encyclopedia article covers one aspect and lists 4 ingredients, each with their sign on that aspect. The article can have any mix of + and − entries.

hints.text: The encyclopedia article on Red aspect tells you: ingredient 1 is R+, ingredient 2 is R+, ingredient 3 is R−, ingredient 4 is R−. You also know ingredient 1 has G− and B−.
Ingredient 1 has R+, G−, B−. Look for an alchemical with exactly those three signs.
The answer is pNn (alchemical 3): R+, G−, B−.
